metadata.title: Musaium — The Intelligent Museum Assistant
metadata.description: Photograph an artwork, ask a question, and let AI guide you. Musaium transforms every visit into an enriching experience.

hero.title: Your museum guide, powered by AI
hero.subtitle: Photograph an artwork, ask a question — Musaium responds with the historical, artistic, and cultural context of every piece.

features.title: How it works

items.title: Photograph
items.description: Take a photo of any artwork in a museum.

items.title: Ask your question
items.description: Ask whatever you want to know — technique, history, context.

items.title: Get an answer
items.description: AI analyzes the artwork and responds in real time with reliable sources.

features.gridSubtitle: Musaium combines visual recognition, artificial intelligence, and cultural data for an unprecedented museum experience.

grid.title: Visual recognition
grid.description: Take a photo of an artwork and AI identifies it instantly through computer vision.

grid.title: Contextual AI chat
grid.description: Ask your questions in natural language and receive detailed, sourced answers.

grid.title: Multilingual
grid.description: Interact in your language. Musaium understands and responds in French, English, and more.

grid.title: Visit history
grid.description: Find all your conversations and explored artworks, organized by visit.

grid.title: Offline mode
grid.description: Access your previous conversations even without an internet connection.

grid.title: Reliable sources
grid.description: Every answer is enriched by Wikidata and verified cultural databases.

showcase.title: An experience designed for the museum
showcase.description: Clean interface, instant answers, and intuitive navigation. Musaium adapts to your pace for a frictionless discovery.
showcase.caption: Available on iOS and Android

reviews.title: Your opinion matters
reviews.subtitle: Help us improve Musaium by sharing your museum experience.
reviews.ctaSubtitle: Share your experience and help other visitors

download.title: Ready to transform your visits?
download.subtitle: Download Musaium for free and start exploring museums differently.

chatShowcase.title: Point. Discover. Understand.
chatShowcase.subtitle: Aim your camera at any artwork. Within seconds, AI reveals its history, technique, and cultural significance.
bullets: Detailed answers backed by verified sources

messages.text: The Venus de Milo is a famous ancient Greek sculpture from the 2nd century BC. It represents Aphrodite, the goddess of love and beauty. Despite missing arms, it radiates remarkable elegance through the draping of its robes.

This is The Raft of the Medusa by Théodore Géricault, painted in 1818-1819. It depicts a group of shipwrecked sailors fighting for survival on a raft, showcasing dramatic realism and human desperation.

mapsShowcase.title: Every museum. Right around you.
mapsShowcase.subtitle: Wherever you are, Musaium locates nearby museums on an interactive map. From Paris to San Francisco, your guide travels with you.
bullets: List or map view — your choice

multiDevice.title: A companion on every screen.
multiDevice.subtitle: iPhone, iPad, Android — Musaium adapts natively to your device for an optimal experience, wherever you are.

items.question: Is the app free?
items.answer: Yes, Musaium is completely free. Some advanced features may be offered as premium in the future.

items.question: Which museums are compatible?
items.answer: Musaium works in all museums. The AI recognizes artworks through computer vision and enriches responses via Wikidata.

items.question: Is my data protected?
items.answer: Absolutely. Your photos are never shared with third parties. See our privacy policy for full details.

items.question: Can the AI be wrong?
items.answer: Yes, that's why Musaium displays a transparency disclaimer before each session. Responses are AI-generated and may contain inaccuracies. We encourage you to verify important facts.

items.question: Do I need an internet connection?
items.answer: A connection is needed for new conversations. However, your previous conversations are accessible offline.

items.question: In which countries does Musaium work?
items.answer: Musaium works worldwide. The app uses geolocation to find nearby museums, and the AI can analyze artworks from any origin.

items.question: How do I contact support?
items.answer: Use the contact form on our support page or reach us on social media.

support.title: Help Center
support.subtitle: Find answers to your questions or contact us directly.

faq.question: Is the app free?
faq.answer: Yes, Musaium is free. Some advanced features may be offered as premium in the future.

faq.question: Which museums are compatible?
faq.answer: Musaium works in all museums. The AI recognizes artworks through computer vision and enriches its responses via Wikidata.

faq.question: Is my data protected?
faq.answer: Absolutely. Check our privacy policy for full details. Your photos are never shared.

faq.question: How do I contact support?
faq.answer: Use the form below or reach us on Telegram @musaium_support.

contact.title: Contact us
contact.success: Thank you! Your message has been sent. We'll get back to you as soon as possible.
contact.error: Unable to send your message right now. Please try again in a few minutes.

resetPassword.title: Reset your password
resetPassword.successHint: You can now sign in with your new password.
resetPassword.passwordTooShort: Password must be at least 8 characters

verifyEmail.title: Email verification
verifyEmail.successHint: Your email address is now confirmed. You can return to the Musaium app.
verifyEmail.invalidTokenHint: The link may have already been used or expired after 24 hours. Try again from the app.
verifyEmail.errorHint: Something went wrong. Please try again later.

confirmEmailChange.title: Email address change
confirmEmailChange.successHint: Your new email address is active. Use it to sign in next time.
confirmEmailChange.invalidTokenHint: The link may have already been used or expired after 1 hour. Start the procedure again from the app.
confirmEmailChange.errorHint: Something went wrong. Please try again later.
